title: Screen Capture & OCR
description: Agent captures screen content, performs OCR to extract text, and detects UI elements for vision-based task execution

use_cases.name: Capture Full Screen
use_cases.notes: Uses PIL.ImageGrab.grab(); falls back to UC3 under RDP disconnect

use_cases.name: Capture Screen Region
use_cases.notes: Pixel-coordinate bounding box passed to ImageGrab

use_cases.name: Capture Window via PrintWindow API
use_cases.notes: Uses win32gui + PrintWindow; works when RDP session is disconnected (ImageGrab returns black)

use_cases.name: OCR Image File
use_cases.notes: Accepts file path or PIL Image; optional enhance pre-processing (scale x3, contrast x3)

use_cases.name: Extract Text with OCR
use_cases.notes: Converts PIL Image to numpy array; strips CJK inter-character spaces; conf cast from str to float

use_cases.name: Detect UI Elements
use_cases.notes: Loads YOLO model (ultralytics); returns list of {bbox:[x1,y1,x2,y2], confidence, class}

use_cases.name: OCR Text from Image File
use_cases.notes: Standalone OCR call in ui_detect; guarded by HAS_OCR flag; returns [] if engine unavailable

use_cases.name: Visualize Detection Results
use_cases.notes: Draws red bboxes for YOLO detections, blue polygons for OCR regions; saves PNG + JSON

use_cases.name: Preprocess Image for OCR
use_cases.notes: Optional enhancement; disabled by default as it degrades clear text

key_constraints: RapidOCR engine is lazily initialized (singleton) in ocr_utils.py
ocr_text in ui_detect.py uses a module-level RapidOCR instance initialized at import time
RDP disconnect: ImageGrab returns black frame — use ocr_window(hwnd) instead
enhance=True can degrade already-clear text; disabled by default
HAS_OCR flag in ui_detect.py guards all OCR calls; YOLO detection still works without OCR
YOLO model path defaults to ../temp/weights/icon_detect/model.pt relative to script
